description: Generate a transfer package for migrating a community to another PDS. Requires auth (owner only). Per AT Protocol, only the DID holder can initiate transfer.

main.description: Generate a complete transfer package including a time-limited transfer token, community data, and migration instructions.

errors.name: Forbidden
errors.description: Only the community owner can initiate a transfer.

errors.name: CommunityTakenDown
errors.description: The community has been taken down and cannot be transferred.

did.description: The DID of the community to transfer.

didMethod.description: The DID method used (plc or web).

totalRecords.description: Total number of records in the transfer.

memberCount.description: Number of members in the community.

transferToken.description: A time-limited token authorizing the transfer.

sourcePds.description: The URL of the source PDS.

collections.description: Record of collection arrays, keyed by collection NSID.

instructions.description: Human-readable instructions for completing the transfer.
